name: Amaretto Peach Cheesecake
recipeIngredient: 16 Oz. Can Peach Halves, drained and pureed
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat butter and sugar until light and fluffy. Blend in egg.
2. Add flour and mix well. Spread dough onto the bottom of a 9-inch springform pan.
3. Bake at 450°F for 10 minutes.
4. Combine cream cheese, sugar, and flour. Add eggs one at a time.
5. Add peaches and Amaretto. Pour over crust.
6. Reduce oven temperature to 250°F and continue baking for 1 hour and 5 minutes.
7. Cool cake in the oven with the door ajar. Loosen cake from the rim of the pan, cool, then chill.
